docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,500.00 FILED BY O'DELL, LANCE WILLIAM AS TO DEFENDANT MORGAN, DIANNA ENTERPRISE RENT-A-CAR COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-20-2001 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

CERTIFIED MAILING TO CT CORP SYSTEM-AGENT ENTERPRISE RENT-A-CAR RETURNED SIGNED.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION APR-20-2001, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAY-18-2001 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 DIANNA MORGAN WAIVES SERVICE. CONTINUANCE IS FOR DEFT MORGAN'S WITNESS TO APPEAR.
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF HEARING RETURNED TO COURT RETURNED TO COURT: RETURN TO SENDER.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF O'DELL, LANCE WILLIAM RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MORGAN, DIANNA ENTERPRISE RENT-A-CAR COMPANY $2,749.00 PRINCIPAL, $34.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,783.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT MORGAN, DIANNA ENTERPRISE RENT-A-CAR COMPANY
